chains.label: guard-own-tower-hp
notes: The chain always appears immediately after the line that names the red tower-HP bar.
Best current reading is an own-tower HP guard/loss-condition highlight.

samples.speaker: Cecil
samples.text: Don't let the enemy !cff0005drop its HP down to 0!cffffff, or you'll lose.
samples.sequence: cmd-02 > cmd-00 > cmd-00 > cmd-02 > set-right-portrait > set-expression

samples.speaker: Arang
samples.text: Don't let the enemy !cff0005drop its HP down to 0!cffffff, or we lose.

samples.speaker: Lantere
samples.text: Don't let the enemy !cff0005drop its HP down to 0!cffffff, or we lose.
samples.sequence: cmd-02 > cmd-00 > cmd-00 > cmd-02 > set-right-portrait > set-expression

chains.label: focus-enemy-tower-hp
notes: The chain always follows the line that names the enemy tower HP bar.
Best current reading is an enemy-tower HP / victory-condition highlight.

samples.text: !cff0005Drop its HP down to 0!cffffff, then we win!

samples.text: !cff0005Drop its HP down to 0!cffffff, then we win!

samples.text: Touch it when you want to go out and fight.

samples.text: Touch it when you want to go out and fight.

chains.label: hero-return-button-highlight

findings: battle-hud-guard-hp is mirrored across 3/3 expected English tutorial scripts via raw prefix `000d0040`.
battle-hud-goal-hp is mirrored across 3/3 expected English tutorial scripts via raw prefix `000d0140`.
battle-hud-dispatch-arrows is mirrored across 3/3 expected English tutorial scripts via raw prefix `060d0240`.
battle-hud-unit-card is mirrored across 3/3 expected English tutorial scripts via raw prefix `000d0340`.
battle-hud-mana-bar is mirrored across 3/3 expected English tutorial scripts via raw prefix `000d0440`.
battle-hud-hero-sortie is mirrored across 3/3 expected English tutorial scripts via raw prefix `000d0540`.
battle-hud-hero-return is mirrored across 3/3 expected English tutorial scripts via raw prefix `000d0640`.
tower-menu-highlight is mirrored across 3/3 expected English tutorial scripts via raw prefix `060d0740`.
mana-upgrade-highlight is mirrored across 3/3 expected English tutorial scripts via raw prefix `060d0840`.
population-upgrade-highlight is mirrored across 3/3 expected English tutorial scripts via raw prefix `060d0940`.
skill-menu-highlight is mirrored across 3/3 expected English tutorial scripts via raw prefix `060d0a40`.
skill-slot-highlight is mirrored across 3/3 expected English tutorial scripts via raw prefix `060d0b40`.
item-menu-highlight is mirrored across 3/3 expected English tutorial scripts via raw prefix `060d0c40`.
system-menu-highlight is mirrored across 3/3 expected English tutorial scripts via raw prefix `060d0d40`.
quest-panel-highlight is mirrored across 3/3 expected English tutorial scripts via raw prefix `060d0e40`.
The battle-HUD family still relies on raw prefix substrings because the current prefix parser under-reads some selector bytes as standard portrait or pose commands.
The menu-training family is structurally cleaner: the same `cmd-02 > cmd-06 > selector(0x40) > cmd-02 > cmd-05` shape repeats across Vincent, Helba, and Juno tutorials.
